feat.name: The Dead Tell Tales
feat.text: New campfire chroniclers are inundated with the stories of the ghosts below Pulura’s Fall and the lessons learned there. You have resistance equal to your level to spirit and void damage caused by a haunt, spirit, or incorporeal undead. The first time you take damage from a haunt or spirit, you learn the general story of its origin (such as the type of tragedy that caused a ghost to linger or what a spirit represents).

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.
